feature: ReturnOrderBy4 - Order by in combination with projection

scenarios.id: ReturnOrderBy4 - Order by in combination with projection-[1] ORDER BY of a column introduced in RETURN should return salient results in ascending order
scenarios.description: [1] ORDER BY of a column introduced in RETURN should return salient results in ascending order
scenarios.query:
WITH [0, 1] AS prows, [[2], [3, 4]] AS qrows
UNWIND prows AS p
UNWIND qrows[p] AS q
WITH p, count(q) AS rng
RETURN p
ORDER BY rng
scenarios.skip_reason: parser: UNWIND keyword not yet in grammar

scenarios.id: ReturnOrderBy4 - Order by in combination with projection-[2] Handle projections with ORDER BY
setup: CREATE (c1:Crew {name: 'Neo', rank: 1}), (c2:Crew {name: 'Neo', rank: 2}), (c3:Crew {name: 'Neo', rank: 3}), (c4:Crew {name: 'Neo', rank: 4}), (c5:Crew {name: 'Neo', rank: 5})
scenarios.query:
MATCH (c:Crew {name: 'Neo'})
WITH c, 0 AS relevance
RETURN c.rank AS rank
ORDER BY relevance, c.rank
scenarios.skip_reason: engine: WITH clause in pipeline not fully supported
